creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Very early in the bootstrap phase of the build, I hit this:

/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/zic.c:464:8: error: an attribute list cannot appear here                                                            
  464 | static ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN void                                                                                                                         
      |        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~                                              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/private.h:471:30: note: expanded from macro 'ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN'
  471 | #  define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN [[noreturn]]                                                                                                              
      |                              ^~~~~~~~~~~~                     
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/zic.c:471:8: error: an attribute list cannot appear here
  471 | static ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN void                                         
      |        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~                                              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/private.h:471:30: note: expanded from macro 'ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN'
  471 | #  define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN [[noreturn]]                              
      |                              ^~~~~~~~~~~~              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/zic.c:669:8: error: an attribute list cannot appear here
  669 | static ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN void                                                                                                                         
      |        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~                                                                                                                              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/private.h:471:30: note: expanded from macro 'ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN'
  471 | #  define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN [[noreturn]]                              
      |                              ^~~~~~~~~~~~                                                                                                              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/zic.c:3778:8: error: an attribute list cannot appear here                                                           
 3778 | static ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN void                                                                                                                         
      |        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~                                                                                                                              
/home/markj/dev/wg/dev/13.2/contrib/tzcode/private.h:471:30: note: expanded from macro 'ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN'                                                    
  471 | #  define ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN [[noreturn]]                                                                                                              
      |                              ^~~~~~~~~~~~          

The solution is to swap "static" and "ATTRIBUTE_NORETURN", which a subsequent tzcode import did.  We should commit a minimal patch to releng/13.2 to fix this, though, since it's useful to be able to build releng/13.2 on newer branches.

I'm happy to do this if others on secteam have no objection.
